assistant.noData: There is not enough spending data in this period yet. Once transactions appear, Finanko can highlight patterns and tradeoffs.
assistant.response.category: {category} is the largest visible spending category at about {currency} {amount}. The useful question is whether this category buys comfort, health, speed, or habit. That distinction decides what can be reduced without making the month feel worse.
assistant.response.optimize: {category} is the largest visible spending category for this period. A 15% reduction would free about {currency} {periodAmount} for the period, or roughly {currency} {yearAmount} per year if the pattern repeats. The tradeoff is lower convenience or fewer discretionary purchases in that category.
assistant.response.portfolio: Portfolio overview: income is {currency} {income}, expenses are {currency} {expenses}, and net flow is {currency} {net}. There are {debts} debt accounts and {interestAccounts} interest-bearing accounts; the highest configured annual rate is {highestRate}%. This is useful for scenario tracking, not investment or credit advice.
assistant.safeActions: Choose a safe analysis action. Free text is disabled for MVP.
auth.description: Minimal dashboard for portfolios, accounts, spending, savings, and debt.
auth.envHint: Local mode is active. Data is stored on this device.
confirm.deletePortfolio.description: This hides the portfolio and excludes its data from normal app views. Type the portfolio name to confirm.
confirm.deletePortfolio.title: Delete portfolio?
confirm.deleteTransaction.title: Delete transaction?
confirm.archiveAccount.content: {name} will be hidden from active account lists. Existing transactions stay in history and analytics.
confirm.archiveAccount.title: Archive account?
confirm.resetLocalData.content: This will clear local financial records on this device and restore an empty starter shell.
confirm.resetLocalData.title: Reset local data?
feedback.invalidMoneyAmount: Money amounts must use valid currency precision
feedback.receiptParseFailed: Receipt was not recognized well enough. Try a sharper photo with all line items visible.
feedback.transactionItemsMismatch: Item total must match transaction amount
feedback.debtPaymentMismatch: Debt payment must equal principal plus interest
feedback.debtPaymentRequiresDebtAccount: Debt payment target must be a debt, credit, or mortgage account
form.name: Name
receipt.description: Upload a receipt image or PDF. Finanko will prepare a transaction and line items for review.
